---
title: "FUSION Manhattan Plots"
author: "Nico Valencia"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(topr)
library(qqman)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

```


```{r}
base_dir <- "/Users/nvalenci/Desktop/work/khat_gwas/fusion/out/studysite_covarAll"

# Recursively find ALL .dat files
fusion_files <- list.files(
  path = base_dir,
  pattern = "\\.dat$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Number of files found
length(fusion_files)

# Print all file paths
fusion_files
```

```{r}
# number of rows --> bonferroni multiple hypothesis adjustment
fusion_list <- lapply(fusion_files, read.delim)
```

```{r}
total_rows <- sum(sapply(fusion_list, nrow))
cat("Number of tests performed: ", total_rows)
```

```{r}
global_bonfP <- 0.05/total_rows
cat("Bonferroni adjusted pval for all TWAS: ", 0.05/total_rows)

```

```{r}


base_dir <- "/Users/nvalenci/Desktop/work/khat_gwas/fusion/out/studysite_covarAll"

# recursively find all FUSION result files
smr_files <- list.files(
  base_dir,
  pattern = "\\.smr$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of FUSION files found:", length(smr_files), "\n")

results_list <- list()

for (f in smr_files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", f, "\n")

  # safely read file
  dt <- tryCatch(
    fread(f),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(dt)) {
    cat("Could not read:", f, "\n")
    next
  }

  # skip empty files
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) {
    cat("Empty file:", f, "\n")
    next
  }

  # identify SMR p-value column
  smr_p_col <- c("p_SMR", "pSMR", "P_SMR")[
    c("p_SMR", "pSMR", "P_SMR") %in% names(dt)
  ][1]

  if (is.na(smr_p_col)) {
    cat("No SMR p-value column found:", f, "\n")
    next
  }

  # identify coloc PP4 column if present
  pp4_col <- c("colocPP4", "PP.H4.abf", "PP4", "pp4")[
    c("colocPP4", "PP.H4.abf", "PP4", "pp4") %in% names(dt)
  ][1]

  # bonferroni threshold based on UNIQUE probes/genes
  n_tests <- n_distinct(
    dt$ProbeID %||% dt$probeID %||% dt$Gene %||% seq_len(nrow(dt))
  )


  sig_dt <- dt %>%
    filter(.data[[smr_p_col]] < global_bonfP)

  if (nrow(sig_dt) == 0) {
    cat("No Bonferroni-significant signals\n")
    next
  }


  cat("Significant rows:", nrow(sig_dt), "\n")

  # annotate source file
  sig_dt$source_file <- basename(f)
  sig_dt$full_path <- f
  sig_dt$bonf_threshold <- global_bonfP

  # pull useful columns if they exist
  keep_cols <- c(
    "ProbeID",
    "Gene",
    "gene",
    smr_p_col,
    "p_HEIDI",
    "nsnp_HEIDI",
    pp4_col,
    "source_file",
    "full_path",
    "global_bonfP"
  )

  keep_cols <- keep_cols[keep_cols %in% names(sig_dt)]

  results_list[[f]] <- sig_dt[, ..keep_cols]
}

final_results <- bind_rows(results_list)

cat("\n=========================\n")
cat("FINAL SIGNIFICANT RESULTS\n")
cat("=========================\n")

print(final_results)

# optional: save results
fwrite(
  final_results,
  file.path(base_dir, "significant_smr_results_with_colocPP4.tsv"),
  sep = "\t"
)
```

```{r}

# KU x GTExV8 FUSION Manhattan plots


ku_files <- fusion_files[grepl("/ku/", fusion_files)]

for (f in ku_files) {

  df <- fread(f)

  plot_df <- df %>%
    transmute(
      SNP = ID,
      CHR = as.integer(CHR),
      BP = (as.numeric(P0) + as.numeric(P1)) / 2,
      P = as.numeric(TWAS.P)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(SNP),
      !is.na(CHR),
      !is.na(BP),
      !is.na(P),
      P > 0
    )

  # Extract only tissue/cell type
  tissue <- basename(f)

  tissue <- gsub("^.*GTExv8\\.ALL\\.", "", tissue)
  tissue <- gsub("\\.all_chr\\.dat$", "", tissue)

 

  plot_title <- paste0(
    tissue,
    " | Bonf. Pval = ",
    signif(global_bonfP, 3)
  )

  manhattan(
    plot_df,
    annotateTop = FALSE,
    main = plot_title
  )
}


```
```{r}

# KUF x GTExV8 FUSION Manhattan PLots

kuf_files <- fusion_files[grepl("/kuf/", fusion_files)]

for (f in kuf_files) {

  df <- fread(f)

  plot_df <- df %>%
    transmute(
      SNP = ID,
      CHR = as.integer(CHR),
      BP = (as.numeric(P0) + as.numeric(P1)) / 2,
      P = as.numeric(TWAS.P)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(SNP),
      !is.na(CHR),
      !is.na(BP),
      !is.na(P),
      P > 0
    )

  tissue <- basename(f)

  tissue <- gsub("^.*GTExv8\\.ALL\\.", "", tissue)
  tissue <- gsub("\\.all_chr\\.dat$", "", tissue)



  plot_title <- paste0(
    tissue,
    " | Bonf. Pval = ",
    signif(global_bonfP, 3)
  )

  manhattan(
    plot_df,
    annotateTop = FALSE,
    main = plot_title
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Analyzing colocalization data (summed up for each tissue)

# Read & Combine all fusion files
read_fusion_set <- function(files, phenotype_label) {
  rbindlist(
    lapply(files, function(f) {
      df <- fread(f)

      # Read in .dat file
      tissue <- basename(f)
      tissue <- gsub("^.*GTExv8\\.ALL\\.", "", tissue)
      tissue <- gsub("\\.all_chr\\.dat$", "", tissue)
      
      # add logP and convert values to numeric
      df %>%
        mutate(
          phenotype = phenotype_label,
          tissue = tissue,
          TWAS.P = as.numeric(TWAS.P),
          TWAS.Z = as.numeric(TWAS.Z),
          COLOC.PP0 = as.numeric(COLOC.PP0),
          COLOC.PP1 = as.numeric(COLOC.PP1),
          COLOC.PP2 = as.numeric(COLOC.PP2),
          COLOC.PP3 = as.numeric(COLOC.PP3),
          COLOC.PP4 = as.numeric(COLOC.PP4),
          # logP required for volcano plot
          logP = -log10(TWAS.P)
        )
    }),
    fill = TRUE
  )
}
```

```{r}
# split KU and KUF files based on folder names
ku_files <- fusion_files[grepl("/ku/", fusion_files)]
kuf_files <- fusion_files[grepl("/kuf/", fusion_files)]

ku_all <- read_fusion_set(ku_files, "KU")
kuf_all <- read_fusion_set(kuf_files, "KUF")
```

```{r}
# create combined datasets for each respective GWAS
ku_all <- read_fusion_set(ku_files, "KU")
kuf_all <- read_fusion_set(kuf_files, "KUF")

# Remove missing/invalid rows relative to each argument
ku_noNA <- ku_all %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(TWAS.P),
    TWAS.P > 0,
    !is.na(logP)
  )

kuf_noNA <- kuf_all %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(TWAS.P),
    TWAS.P > 0,
    !is.na(logP)
  )


```

```{r}
# KU: Volcano plot of COLOC PP4


ggplot(
  ku_noNA,
  aes(
    x = TWAS.Z,
    y = logP,
    color = COLOC.PP4
  )
) +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +

  geom_hline(
    yintercept = -log10(global_bonfP),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red"
  ) +

  # Heat scale for PP4 values
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    na.value = "gray75",
    option = "viridis"
  ) +

  theme_bw() +

  labs(
    title = "KU: Volcano Plot for All TWAS Results",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "N = ", nrow(ku_noNA),
      " genes/tests | Gray points = missing PP4"
    ),
    x = "TWAS Z-score",
    y = expression(-log[10](TWAS.P)),
    color = "COLOC PP4"
  )
# X-axis = TWAS effect direction/strength
# Y-axis = TWAS.P
# Color = probability of shared causality variant (i.e., being PP4)
```

```{r}
# KUF: volcano plot for ALL TWAS results

ggplot(
  kuf_noNA,
  aes(
    x = TWAS.Z,
    y = logP,
    color = COLOC.PP4
  )
) +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +

  geom_hline(
    yintercept = -log10(kuf_bonf),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red"
  ) +

  scale_color_viridis_c(
    na.value = "gray75",
    option = "viridis"
  ) +

  theme_bw() +

  labs(
    title = "KUF: Volcano Plot for All TWAS Results",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "N = ", nrow(kuf_noNA),
      " genes/tests | Gray points = missing PP4"
    ),
    x = "TWAS Z-score",
    y = expression(-log[10](TWAS.P)),
    color = "COLOC PP4"
  )

# X-axis = TWAS effect direction/strength
# Y-axis = TWAS.P
# Color = probability of shared causality variant (i.e., being PP4)
```

```{r fig.width=14, fig.height=3}
# Density plots: KU and KUF transformations

ku_pp_long <- ku_all %>%
  select(
    phenotype,
    tissue,
    ID,
    COLOC.PP0,
    COLOC.PP1,
    COLOC.PP2,
    COLOC.PP3,
    COLOC.PP4
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("COLOC.PP"),
    names_to = "PP_type",
    values_to = "PP"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(PP))

# KUF: transform COLOC PP columns into long format
kuf_pp_long <- kuf_all %>%
  select(
    phenotype,
    tissue,
    ID,
    COLOC.PP0,
    COLOC.PP1,
    COLOC.PP2,
    COLOC.PP3,
    COLOC.PP4
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("COLOC.PP"),
    names_to = "PP_type",
    values_to = "PP"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(PP))

```

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=2.5}

# KU density plots side-by-side
ggplot(
  ku_pp_long,
  aes(x = PP)
) +
  geom_density(
    fill = "steelblue",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +

  # Put PP0–PP4 next to each other horizontally
  facet_wrap(
    ~ PP_type,
    nrow = 1,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +

  theme_bw() +

  # Compress overall appearance
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "KU: COLOC Posterior Probability Densities",
    x = "Posterior Probability",
    y = "Density"
  )

```

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=2.5}

# KUF density plots side-by-side
ggplot(
  kuf_pp_long,
  aes(x = PP)
) +
  geom_density(
    fill = "darkorange",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +

  facet_wrap(
    ~ PP_type,
    nrow = 1,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +

  theme_bw() +

  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "KUF: COLOC Posterior Probability Densities",
    x = "Posterior Probability",
    y = "Density"
  )

```


```{r fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
# KU: TWAS.P vs PP4 figure
ggplot(
  ku_noNA %>% filter(!is.na(COLOC.PP4)),
  aes(
    x = logP,
    y = COLOC.PP4
  )
) +

  geom_point(
    aes(color = COLOC.PP4),
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 1.5
  ) +

  # Bonferroni significance threshold
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = -log10(global_bonfP),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +

  # Common coloc threshold
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.8,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "darkgreen",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +

  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis") +

  theme_bw() +

  labs(
    title = "KU: TWAS Significance vs Colocalization",
#    subtitle = "Upper-right = strongest colocalized TWAS signals",
    x = expression(-log[10](TWAS.P)),
    y = "COLOC PP4",
    color = "PP4"
  )

```

```{r fig.width=7, fig.height=5}

ggplot(
  kuf_noNA %>% filter(!is.na(COLOC.PP4)),
  aes(
    x = logP,
    y = COLOC.PP4
  )
) +

  geom_point(
    aes(color = COLOC.PP4),
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 1.5
  ) +

  geom_vline(
    xintercept = -log10(global_bonfP),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.8,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "darkgreen",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +

  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis") +

  theme_bw() +

  labs(
    title = "KUF: TWAS Significance vs Colocalization",
#    subtitle = "Upper-right = strongest colocalized TWAS signals",
    x = expression(-log[10](TWAS.P)),
    y = "COLOC PP4",
    color = "PP4"
  )

```
